'''Wookiee-wango''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drink made with [[Sullustan gin]]. It was considered to be stronger than [[Gizer ale]] and [[Lum/Legends|lum]],<ref name="FOO4">{{FactFile|126|FOO 1-4|Galactic Food and Drink}}</ref> and was commonly shaken rather than stirred.<ref name="TToRY">{{StoryCite|story=Goatgrass: The Tale of Ree-Yees|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref>

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref>{{Blog|holocron|13/comments|Major Character Birth Years}} establishes the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], including the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]], as set in the year [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].</ref> the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] criminal [[Ree-Yees/Legends|Ree-Yees]] accepted a Wookiee-wango from [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] while aboard [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]], the [[Khetanna/Legends|''Khetanna'']], shortly before its [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon|destruction]].<ref name="TToRY" /> By [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], it was a popular drink on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="FOO4" />
